title: Verify existing implementation of identity utility
description: The identity utility function already exists at src/utils/identity.ts with full test coverage in src/utils/identity.test.ts. The implementation uses a generic function that returns its input unchanged. Tests verify it works correctly for numbers (identity(5) returns 5), strings (identity('hello') returns 'hello'), objects, arrays, null, undefined, and booleans.
existing_patterns: src/utils/identity.ts follows the single-function utility pattern used in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts file
Tests use vitest with describe/it/expect syntax consistent with other test files
